blended.narrative: Burke Mountain is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 2.5 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 359 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 10 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 2.5" of snow, highs of 33°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 2.4" of snow, highs of 34°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
